displayTitle: Classic Star Wars #03: Darth Vader Strikes (pt.2)
synopsis: "Darth Vader Strikes" is a comic strip written by Archie Goodwin and illustrated by Al Williamson, originally published in 1981 by the Los Angeles Times Syndicate. It was later reprinted in Amazing Heroes magazine #6–12.
title: Classic Star Wars #03: Darth Vader Strikes (pt.2)
